meta.title: Oil & Gas: ICS Threat Landscape
meta.description: Roya Gordon of Accenture focuses in on the oil & gas threat landscape. What the attackers might try to do; how the attackers might attack and their goals; and who are the threat actors currently going after oil and gas asset owners.
